name: libwant-perl
title: libwant-perl
description:
generalisation of wantarray
The Want module generalises the mechanism of the wantarray function,
allowing a function to determine in some detail how its return value
is going to be immediately used.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libwant-perl because generalisation of wantarray.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libwant-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libwant-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libwant-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
